diagrams.title: PCA Workflow Pipeline
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing sequential steps from raw data to reduced dimensions
elements: Select Top k Components (Scree Plot/Variance Threshold)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential nature of PCA transformation process

diagrams.title: Scree Plot with Elbow Method
diagrams.description: Graph showing eigenvalues vs principal component number with elbow point marked
diagrams.purpose: Determining optimal number of components to retain - look for bend/elbow where adding more components has diminishing returns

diagrams.title: 2D Projection Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual showing how 3D data projects onto 2D principal component plane
elements: 2D plane defined by PC1 and PC2
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing what dimensionality reduction means - projecting data onto lower-dimensional subspace while preserving maximum variance
